mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT D.PARTNO) AS cnt FROM TBL_INOUT_ORDERS O JOIN TBL_INOUT_ORDER_DETAIL D ON O.ORDERNO = D.ORDERNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO
O.USEYN = 1 AND O.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND (D.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search})

SELECT O.ADOFREQDT AS PRODUCEDT, O.PLANTCD, D.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, O.ORDERNO AS ORDERNUM, D.SEQ AS ORDERSEQ, D.REQQTY AS PRODUCEQTY, ISNULL(S.STOCKQTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_INOUT_ORDERS O JOIN TBL_INOUT_ORDER_DETAIL D ON O.ORDERNO = D.ORDERNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN (SELECT PARTNO, SUM(STOCKQTY) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO GROUP BY PARTNO) S ON D.PARTNO = S.PARTNO
O.USEYN = 1 AND O.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND O.ADOFREQDT >= #{start_date} AND O.ADOFREQDT <= #{end_date} AND (D.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search})
ORDER BY D.PARTNO, O.ADOFREQDT
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_PRODUCEPLAN (PRODUCEDT, PLANTCD, PARTNO, ORDERNUM, ORDERSEQ, PRODUCEQTY, REGUSERID, REGDTM) VALUES (#{PRODUCEDT}, #{PLANTCD}, #{PARTNO}, #{ORDERNUM}, #{ORDERSEQ}, #{PRODUCEQTY}, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE())
mapper.select:
WITH BOM_CTE AS ( SELECT B.CHILD_PARTNO AS PARTNO, CAST(B.REQQTY AS DECIMAL(18,5)) AS REQQTY, 1 AS LEVEL, CAST(B.ORD AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS PATH FROM TBL_COM_BOM B WHERE B.PAR_PARTNO = #{par_partno} AND B.USEYN = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT B.CHILD_PARTNO AS PARTNO, CAST(C.REQQTY * B.REQQTY AS DECIMAL(18,5)) AS REQQTY, C.LEVEL + 1 AS LEVEL, CAST(C.PATH + '-' + CAST(B.ORD AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS VARCHAR(MAX)) AS PATH FROM TBL_COM_BOM B JOIN BOM_CTE C ON B.PAR_PARTNO = C.PARTNO WHERE B.USEYN = 1 ) SELECT CTE.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, G.UNIT_PRICE, G.COMPANYCD, C.COMPANYNM, CTE.REQQTY, CTE.LEVEL, CTE.PATH, ISNULL(S.STOCKQTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY FROM BOM_CTE CTE LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON CTE.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON G.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD LEFT JOIN (SELECT LS.PARTNO, SUM(SK.STOCKQTY) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO GROUP BY LS.PARTNO) S ON CTE.PARTNO = S.PARTNO ORDER BY CTE.PATH

SELECT 'PO' + FORMAT(GETDATE(),'yyyyMMdd') + '-' + RIGHT('000' + CAST(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(ORDERNUM,3) AS INT)),0)+1 AS VARCHAR), 3) AS NEXTNUM FROM TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER WHERE ORDERNUM LIKE 'PO' + FORMAT(GETDATE(),'yyyyMMdd') + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER (ORDERNUM, PLANTCD, COMPANYCD, ORDERDT, ADOFREQDT, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, ORDERSTATE, REMARK) VALUES (#{ORDERNUM}, #{PLANTCD}, #{COMPANYCD}, #{ORDERDT}, #{ADOFREQDT}, 1, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{ORDERSTATE}, #{REMARK})
INSERT INTO TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL (ORDERNUM, PARTNO, USEYN, ORDERQTY, REMARK, ADOFREQDT, UNIT_PRICE) VALUES (#{ORDERNUM}, #{PARTNO}, 1, #{ORDERQTY}, #{REMARK}, #{ADOFREQDT}, #{UNIT_PRICE})
mapper.select:
SELECT O.ORDERNUM, O.PLANTCD, P.PLANTNM, O.COMPANYCD, C.COMPANYNM, O.ORDERDT, O.ADOFREQDT, O.ORDERSTATE, (SELECT ISNULL(SUM(D.ORDERQTY * ISNULL(D.UNIT_PRICE, 0)), 0) FROM TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL D WHERE D.ORDERNUM = O.ORDERNUM AND D.USEYN = 1) AS TOTALAMT, U.NAME AS REGUSERNM, O.REMARK FROM TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER O LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PLANT P ON O.PLANTCD = P.PLANTCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_COMPANY C ON O.COMPANYCD = C.COMPANYCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_MEMBERS U ON O.REGUSERID = U.EMPID
O.USEYN = 1 AND O.ORDERSTATE != 'COMPLETED' AND O.ORDERDT >= #{start_date} AND O.ORDERDT <= #{end_date} AND O.PLANTCD = #{plant_cd} AND O.COMPANYCD = #{company_cd}
AND (O.ORDERNUM LIKE #{search} OR C.COMPANYNM LIKE #{search} OR EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL D LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO WHERE D.ORDERNUM = O.ORDERNUM AND D.USEYN = 1 AND (D.PARTNO LIKE #{search} OR G.PARTNM LIKE #{search})))
ORDER BY O.ORDERDT DESC, O.ORDERNUM DESC

SELECT D.ORDERNUM, D.PARTNO, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, D.UNIT_PRICE, D.ORDERQTY, D.ADOFREQDT, ISNULL(D.ORDERQTY * ISNULL(D.UNIT_PRICE, 0), 0) AS AMT, D.INQTY, (D.ORDERQTY - ISNULL(D.INQTY, 0)) AS REMAINQTY, (SELECT MAX(W.INDAY) FROM TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE_DETAIL WD JOIN TBL_INOUT_WAREHOUSE W ON WD.WAREHOUSENUM = W.WAREHOUSENUM WHERE W.ORDERNUM = D.ORDERNUM AND WD.PARTNO = D.PARTNO AND WD.USEYN=1) AS LASTINDAY, ISNULL(S.STOCKQTY, 0) AS STOCKQTY, D.REMARK FROM TBL_INOUT_PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL D LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON D.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN (SELECT LS.PARTNO, SUM(SK.STOCKQTY) AS STOCKQTY FROM TBL_PROD_STOCK SK JOIN TBL_PROD_LOTSTATE LS ON SK.LOTNO = LS.LOTNO GROUP BY LS.PARTNO) S ON D.PARTNO = S.PARTNO WHERE D.ORDERNUM = #{ORDERNUM} AND D.USEYN = 1 ORDER BY D.PARTNO
